overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian futuristic city in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), walking across an abandoned elevated terrace with overgrown vegetation toward massive construction sites, then turning along a graffiti-covered pathway and descending into a concrete underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned elevated terrace with construction site

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide paved terrace toward the massive twin skyscrapers under construction

entered.detail: massive modern skyscrapers under construction with yellow structural elements on the right tower
tower cranes attached to the unfinished buildings
palm trees lining the center of the terrace path
scattered concrete debris and broken pavement on the left side
red shipping container or structure at the far end of the terrace

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward across a wide, sunlit elevated terrace toward massive skyscrapers under construction. Palm trees line the path while construction cranes tower above the unfinished buildings. The area shows signs of abandonment with debris and overgrown vegetation.

events.description: camera turns left at terrace edge to follow elevated path, revealing city view below

agents.ego_description: turning left at the terrace edge and continuing along the elevated walkway with expansive views of the city below

entered.detail: panoramic view of the lower city district with dense buildings and smoke plumes rising
dark smoke rising from the industrial area in the distance

segments.scene_description: Reaching the edge of the terrace, the camera turns left to follow an elevated walkway. The twin skyscrapers shift to the right side of the frame while a sweeping view of the lower city opens up to the left, with smoke visible rising from the industrial district below.

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow pathway beside a blue wall covered in graffiti tags

entered.detail: tall blue concrete wall covered in white and purple graffiti tags including 'NC'
weathered concrete benches along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the camera moves along a blue graffiti-covered wall on the right. The city view falls behind while the walkway continues forward with overgrown vegetation on the left and industrial cranes visible ahead. The environment feels more enclosed and decayed.

events.description: entering the shadowed concrete tunnel, lighting dims significantly from bright sunlight to dark shade

agents.ego_description: descending into the dark concrete underpass tunnel entrance

entered.detail: dark rectangular tunnel entrance in the concrete structure ahead
colorful graffiti art on the concrete walls near the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a dark concrete tunnel, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadow. The blue graffiti wall continues alongside while the tunnel entrance looms ahead, marked with graffiti art. The environment becomes significantly darker as the camera descends into the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a sunlit, abandoned terrace that gradually descends into a dark, enclosed concrete underpass. It begins by moving forward past palm trees and debris toward massive skyscrapers under construction, with towering cranes dominating the bright skyline. As the camera reaches the edge of the terrace, it turns left along an elevated walkway, shifting the skyscrapers to the side to reveal a sweeping view of a smoking industrial district below. The scene then narrows as the camera follows a blue graffiti-covered wall, leaving the open city view behind while moving through increasingly decayed surroundings and overgrown vegetation. Finally, the bright sunlight fades as the camera enters a graffiti-marked concrete tunnel, transitioning into deep shadow while descending into the underpass.
